Books
  • The World of Ice & Fire (appendix)
  • Fire & Blood (mentioned)

Benjen Stark was a member of House Stark. He was the eldest son of Bennard Stark and Lady Margaret Karstark.[2] He was probably named after his grandfather, Lord Benjen Stark.

History[ ]

Benjen was imprisoned in 126 AC with his father and brothers by his cousin Lord Cregan Stark.[3]
